name: Audio overview edge cases — conflicting evidence and single-paper audio

setup.description: Uses the TOPCAT (negative) and Aldo-DHF (mixed) spironolactone trials from Cycle 14. Tests that the audio overview format handles conflicting evidence honestly — the conversational tone must NOT fabricate consensus or downplay negative results. Also tests single-query audio with a single paper to verify the generator handles 1-paper gracefully.

papers.title: TOPCAT: Treatment of Preserved Cardiac Function Heart Failure with an Aldosterone Antagonist
Aldo-DHF: Effect of Spironolactone on Diastolic Function in Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction

mockChunks.text: Spironolactone did NOT significantly reduce the primary composite endpoint of cardiovascular death, aborted cardiac arrest, or hospitalization for heart failure (HR 0.89; 95% CI 0.77-1.04; P=0.14).
3445 patients aged ≥50 years with symptomatic heart failure and ejection fraction ≥45% were enrolled. The median follow-up was 3.3 years.
A post-hoc regional analysis revealed significant heterogeneity: patients in the Americas showed benefit (HR 0.82; P=0.026), while patients in Russia/Georgia showed no benefit (HR 1.10; P=0.46).

Spironolactone significantly improved diastolic function as measured by E/e' ratio (change: -1.5 vs -0.1; P<0.001). However, spironolactone did NOT improve symptoms, exercise capacity, or quality of life.
422 patients with diastolic dysfunction and preserved ejection fraction (LVEF ≥50%) were enrolled. Patients received spironolactone 25mg daily for 12 months.

queries.query: Generate an audio overview discussing these spironolactone trials as a deep dive
expectedBehavior: TOPCAT negative result (P=0.14) clearly stated by Expert
Expert does NOT claim spironolactone is effective
Conflicting evidence presented honestly in wrap-up
Post-hoc regional analysis mentioned with caveat
failurePatterns: Claims spironolactone is effective in HFpEF
Omits the negative P=0.14 from TOPCAT

queries.query: What is the clinical significance of the TOPCAT regional analysis?
expectedBehavior: NOT routed as audio overview — plain question
Mentions post-hoc analysis and regional heterogeneity
Includes appropriate caveat about post-hoc interpretation
failurePatterns: Generates audio script for a plain question

qualityCriteria: Audio overview honestly presents the conflicting evidence
TOPCAT negative P=0.14 is not buried or minimized
Aldo-DHF function-vs-symptom dissociation is clearly stated
Wrap-up acknowledges mixed evidence, does NOT fabricate consensus
Post-hoc regional analysis mentioned with caveat about interpretation
Plain question (q2) is NOT routed as audio
No fabricated trial data or outcomes
